nl_query: Which configurations at course scope override the global scope setting for the same configuration key, and show the course code, global value, course value, and the data type.
failed_sql:
SELECT au.code AS academic_unit_code, g.config_value AS global_value, au.config_value AS academic_unit_value, g.data_type AS data_type
FROM   configuration g
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = g.scope_id
WHERE  g.scope_type = 'GLOBAL'
  AND  au.scope_type = 'ACADEMIC_UNIT'
  AND  g.config_key = au.config_key
  AND  au.config_value <> g.config_value
ORDER  BY au.code;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): academic_unit.config_value, academic_unit.config_value, academic_unit.config_key, academic_unit.scope_type. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
